name: flutter_devtools_mcp
description: MCP server for Flutter UI automation via VM Service extensions. Connect to a running Flutter debug app by passing its VM Service URL.

tools.name: connect
tools.description: Connect to a running Flutter debug app. Requires vmServiceUrl — the http:// URL from flutter run output (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:54321/abc123=/).

tools.name: disconnect
tools.description: Disconnect from the currently connected Flutter app. Closes the VM Service WebSocket.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Check whether connected to a Flutter app. Returns {"connected": true/false}.

tools.name: widget_tree
tools.description: Get the current widget tree as structured JSON — every widget, type, label, key, bounds, children.

tools.name: inspect
tools.description: Get detailed properties of a specific widget node by its ID (from widget_tree).

tools.name: get_parent_chain
tools.description: Get ancestor chain from a widget node up to root.

tools.name: get_render_tree
tools.description: Dump the render object tree as text (layout, constraints, sizes).

tools.name: get_layer_tree
tools.description: Dump the compositing layer tree — diagnose saveLayer/opacity overhead.

tools.name: dump_semantics
tools.description: Dump the accessibility/semantics tree in traversal order.

tools.name: tap
tools.description: Tap a widget by selector (semantics:, key:, text:, index:).

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Focus a text field by selector then enter text.

tools.name: scroll
tools.description: Scroll a scrollable widget in a direction.

tools.name: press_back
tools.description: Pop the top route from the navigator stack.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture screen as PNG image (base64).

tools.name: hot_reload
tools.description: Trigger hot reload on the connected app.

tools.name: hot_restart
tools.description: Trigger full hot restart (reassemble).

tools.name: evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate a Dart expression in the running app.

tools.name: get_errors
tools.description: Get Flutter framework errors from the running app.

tools.name: get_logs
tools.description: Capture recent app output (stdout, stderr, log()).

tools.name: get_memory
tools.description: Get memory usage of the app's main isolate (heap, external).

tools.name: toggle_dark_mode
tools.description: Toggle between light and dark mode.

tools.name: toggle_platform
tools.description: Override target platform (android, ios, fuchsia, linux, macos, windows).

tools.name: toggle_debug_paint
tools.description: Toggle widget boundary overlay.

tools.name: toggle_repaint_rainbow
tools.description: Toggle repaint rainbow overlay.

tools.name: toggle_slow_animations
tools.description: Slow down or restore animation speed (1.0=normal).

tools.name: toggle_performance_overlay
tools.description: Toggle frame timing graphs.

tools.name: track_rebuilds
tools.description: Toggle widget rebuild tracking.

tools.name: track_repaints
tools.description: Toggle repaint tracking.
